positive: Stylized geometric celestial body artwork, featuring interlocking rings and cosmic dust formations, presented as a central, symmetrical mandala design. The primary color palette should use deep indigo, sapphire blue, gold leaf metallic accents, and crisp white highlights. The style should be a blend of Art Deco opulence and minimalist scientific illustration. Composition must be perfectly centered and contained within a defined circle for maximum impact on fabric. Clean lines, strong contrast between light and shadow, and a sophisticated, elegant silhouette against a negative space background. Highly detailed, vector-art quality, suitable for screen printing.
